title: BREAKING: US Government BANNED Mythos and Fable
summary: The US government has issued an export control directive forcing Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers effective immediately. The announcement comes from a Better Stack YouTube video citing a regulatory enforcement action.
writeup: This Better Stack video reports that the US government issued an export control directive forcing Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers, effective immediately. The framing ties the shutdown to a regulatory enforcement action rather than a company decision, placing model availability under government export control rather than vendor discretion. The key takeaways: a specific regulatory directive, immediate disablement across all customers, and Anthropic as the named operator complying with the order.
